Class AuditLogAspect

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.audit.AuditLogAspect
@Component @Order(20) public class AuditLogAspect extends Object
AOP aspect that captures audit trail entries for all methods annotated with AuditLog.

For each method invocation an AuditEvent is built containing:

  • Current trace/span IDs from the active OpenTelemetry span
  • Actor extracted from Spring Security's SecurityContextHolder (falls back to "anonymous" when Security is not present)
  • Method arguments (when captureArgs=true)
  • Return value (when captureResult=true)
  • Exception details (outcome set to FAILURE)

The event is then published via ApplicationEventPublisher. Register additional @EventListener(AuditEvent.class) beans to persist audit entries to a database, message queue, or external system.
